overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban plaza in Night City. The scene features bright midday sun, neon advertisements, palm trees, and modern glass architecture with distinctive red paved pedestrian areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with water feature and neon structures

events.description: exits dark building corridor into bright open plaza
lighting shifts from dark shadow to bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking out of a dark corridor into a sunlit plaza, approaching a central water feature

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and conversing near the water feature

entered.detail: distinctive red paved pedestrian plaza surface
rectangular water feature with glass covering and aquatic plants visible underneath
futuristic structure with purple neon lighting and circular elements
tall curved glass building with teal tinted windows
tall palm trees lining the plaza center

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from a dark corridor into a bright, sunlit futuristic plaza with distinctive red pavement. A glass-covered water feature sits in the center surrounded by palm trees, while a purple-lit structure glows in the distance. Pedestrians are scattered throughout the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area approaching covered pedestrian walkway

events.description: approaching the entrance to a covered pedestrian walkway with glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking around the water feature and heading toward a covered walkway entrance

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near the water feature edge

entered.detail: entrance to a covered walkway with glass and metal canopy
red and black food stall with orange roof and signage

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past the water feature toward a covered walkway entrance. The purple structure recedes into the distance as a food stall becomes visible on the left. The plaza remains open and sunlit with scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with glass ceiling and neon lighting

events.description: enters covered walkway, lighting becomes shaded with mixed artificial neon
exits covered walkway back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered pedestrian arcade passing groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera in the covered walkway

entered.detail: glass and metal canopy covering the pedestrian walkway with geometric patterns
building facade with blue neon strip lighting along the edge

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian arcade with a glass ceiling that filters the sunlight. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural and artificial neon. Groups of pedestrians walk in opposing directions through this sheltered corridor with food stalls visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with digital advertisements and landscaped stairs

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with large digital billboards and advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza passing various pedestrians and large digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying colorful animated advertisements
black terraced seating or stairs with integrated greenery planters
building facade covered with multiple digital screens and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the character enters a bright open plaza dominated by large digital billboards and advertisements on building facades. Black terraced stairs with greenery appear on the left while pedestrians walk through the sunlit space.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with apartment buildings and landscaped greenery

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the plaza approaching a more residential area with trees and planters

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with balconies and repeating window patterns
planters with bushes and small trees adding greenery to the plaza
blue and yellow vending machine on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the plaza into an area with more landscaped greenery and residential-style buildings. The density of advertisements decreases while trees and planters become more prominent. A vending machine stands on the right as the walk continues through the sunlit urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark corridor into a sprawling, sunlit futuristic plaza that eventually transitions into a landscaped residential district. It begins as the character emerges into a bright open space with red pavement, passing a glass-covered water feature and palm trees while a purple-lit structure glows in the distance. As the character moves forward, the open sunlight shifts into a mix of natural and artificial neon light upon entering a covered pedestrian arcade lined with food stalls. The scene then opens back into a bright plaza dominated by massive digital billboards and black terraced stairs before turning toward a quieter area. Finally, the density of advertisements decreases as the camera glides past vending machines and lush greenery toward residential-style buildings under the midday sun.
